examples: In the corner on the gateleg table the glass paperweight which he had bought on his last visit gleamed softly out of the half-darkness.
In the corner on the gateleg table the glass paper weight which he had bought on his last visit gleamed softly out of the half-darkness.
Actually the idea had first floated into his head in the form of a vision of the glass paper weight mirrored by the surface of the gateleg table.
